overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban waterfront district at dusk. The character moves from an open walkway past a cylindrical billboard tower, through a neon-lit underpass with 'WET DREAM' advertisements, and into a palm-lined plaza with towering skyscrapers and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront pedestrian walkway with corrugated metal retaining wall

events.description: large male pedestrian in blue jacket passes in front of camera from right to left
approaching the entrance to a covered concrete underpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront path toward the underpass entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white outfit walking ahead in the same direction
large male pedestrian in blue jacket walking past the camera

gray corrugated metal retaining wall running along the left side of the walkway
body of water visible beyond the railing on the right side
tall palm tree visible ahead near the underpass entrance
concrete bridge structure spanning across the walkway ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a waterfront pedestrian path at dusk, with a large cylindrical digital billboard tower visible on the left and a corrugated metal wall running alongside. The pavement is wet, reflecting the blue hour sky. A few pedestrians walk ahead as the character approaches a concrete underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with large digital advertisement screens

events.description: entering covered underpass from open waterfront walkway
environment shifts from natural dusk light to artificial pink and purple neon glow from advertisement screens
exiting the underpass into the open plaza with palm trees visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the neon-lit underpass with digital billboards illuminated on both sides

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing on the right side looking at the advertisement screen

entered.detail: large digital screen displaying 'WET DREAM' in bright pink neon letters
matching digital screen on the right wall with pink neon advertisement
white and red advertisement screen for Arasaka corporation visible at the tunnel exit
thick concrete support pillars lining the sides of the underpass

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered concrete underpass illuminated by vibrant pink neon advertisements for 'WET DREAM' on both walls. The environment shifts from natural dusk light to artificial neon glow. Concrete pillars line the walkway as the character approaches the tunnel exit where an Arasaka advertisement is visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with palm trees, digital billboards, and futuristic high-rise buildings

events.description: exiting underpass into open plaza with palm trees and neon-lit storefronts
character turns slightly right while walking past the OLIV storefront
approaching large digital billboard structure displaying 'PURE OVERKILL' advertisement

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza past neon-lit storefronts and other pedestrians, heading toward the large tower

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red dress walking toward the camera
pedestrian in blue shirt and red pants walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: storefront with illuminated 'OLIV' signage and yellow neon accent lighting
large digital billboard displaying 'PURE OVERKILL' with vibrant purple and orange graphics
tall cylindrical skyscraper with illuminated sections rising in the distance
elevated highway ramp structure with vehicles visible above

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the underpass into a spacious open plaza lined with palm trees and futuristic architecture. The area features neon-lit storefronts including one labeled 'OLIV' and large digital billboards displaying 'PURE OVERKILL.' The character walks past other pedestrians toward a massive illuminated skyscraper in the distance, with an elevated highway visible overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim waterfront walkway through a neon-lit tunnel and into a sprawling, futuristic urban plaza. It begins with the character walking along a wet pedestrian path at dusk, passing a large cylindrical digital billboard tower and a corrugated metal wall. As the character moves forward, the natural blue hour light shifts into an artificial pink glow upon entering a concrete underpass lined with vibrant WET DREAM advertisements. The scene then opens as the character emerges from the tunnel, transitioning from the enclosed neon corridor into a spacious plaza filled with palm trees and towering skyscrapers. Finally, the camera follows the character past storefronts and PURE OVERKILL billboards toward a massive illuminated building under an elevated highway.
